What We Do

OUR SERVICES

Complete motorcycle transformation — from engine to exhaust

01 🎨
Full Body Painting

Complete respray with premium paints, colour matching, and flawless finish. Your bike, brand new.

Most Popular
02 ⚙️
Full Reconditioning

Head-to-toe restoration covering mechanical, electrical, and cosmetic — a complete second life.

Signature
03 🔩
Chassis Paint

Frame and chassis restoration with anti-rust treatment and high-durability coating.

04 🏎️
Engine Paint

High-temp engine enamel refinishing to protect and restore your engine's appearance.

05 ✨
Cut & Polish

Machine polishing and paint correction for mirror-like shine on any paint surface.

06 💨
Sandblasting

Professional surface preparation for rust removal and perfect adhesion before repainting.

07 🛡️
Lackering

Premium lacquer top-coat application for deep gloss, UV protection, and durability.

08 ❄️
Full Conditioning

Complete overhaul of all systems — mechanical, electrical, and aesthetic conditioning.

Premium
09 ⚡
Wiring & Electrical

Full electrical system diagnosis, rewiring, and repair for safe and reliable performance.

5+
Years of
Excellence
Our Story

THE MAN
BEHIND THE
MACHINE

Mr. Wishu is Kandy's most trusted name in motorcycle reconditioning. Based in the heart of Kundasale, we've spent years perfecting the craft of transforming worn-out bikes into showroom-worthy machines.

Every bike that comes through our workshop gets the full attention it deserves — from the smallest detail to the biggest restoration. We don't cut corners. We cut rust, old paint, and bad habits.

Premium Paints
Expert Technicians
All Bike Brands
Fast Turnaround
Fair Pricing
Quality Guarantee
Wishmitha M. Ruwanpathirana
Founder & Master Technician · Kundasale, Kandy
How It Works

OUR PROCESS

Simple, transparent, and done right — every time

📞
Book Online

Fill our appointment form or call/WhatsApp us to schedule your drop-off time

🔍
Inspection

We assess your bike fully and give you a clear quote — no hidden surprises

🛠️
Reconditioning

Our experts get to work — precision reconditioning with quality materials only

✅
Quality Check

Every job is inspected and approved before it leaves our workshop

🏍️
Delivery

Collect your transformed bike and ride away with complete confidence
